question_text: The sum of the elements in each row of A ∈Rn×n is 1. If B = A3 −2A2 + A, which one of the following statements is correct (for x ∈Rn)?

options.A: The equation Bx = 0 has no solution
options.B: The equation Bx = 0 has exactly two solutions
options.C: The equation Bx = 0 has inﬁnitely many solutions
options.D: The equation Bx = 0 has a unique solution
